prompts.label: Flutter vs RN choose
prompts.text:
Compare Flutter vs React Native for a beginner with web background.

- Learning curve, job market, native modules
- Neutral 5 bullet comparison

No flame war.

prompts.label: InheritedWidget intuition in Flutter
prompts.text:
Explain InheritedWidget as the primitive pattern behind a lot of Flutter "magic" APIs.
Relate it to accessing Theme.of(context).
Discuss rebuild boundaries at a beginner level.
Mention Provider as ergonomics layered on inherited patterns.
Advise newcomers not to memorize everything before building UI.

prompts.label: React Native Gesture Handler basics
prompts.text:
Explain why some gestures benefit from native-driven handling.
Relate "JS thread busy" freezes to UX symptoms users feel.
Start with simpler Pressable basics before gestures.
Mention expo-router navigation only lightly if relevant.
Encourage profiling when interactions feel sluggish.

prompts.label: Deep links and universal links
prompts.text:
Compare URL schemes versus HTTPS universal links (and why universal links take more setup).
Explain deferred deep linking as vocabulary only.
Warn about simulator vs device mismatches.
Discuss privacy respecting campaign parameters.
Advise documenting supported routes for testers.

prompts.label: Offline-first sketches
prompts.text:
Describe storing data locally while offline and syncing later.
Explain conflict resolution options at a headline level.
Warn beginners that offline-first is heavier than caching.
Recommend starting online-only MVP for learning.
Mention SQLite or embedded stores as possibilities without picking a winner.

prompts.label: Push notification permission UX
prompts.text:
Explain prompting for notification permission only after showing why it helps.
Relate declines to degraded features and graceful UI fallback.
Mention respecting OS settings redirects.
Advise instrumentation as an advanced improvement.
Keep tone practical, not spammy.

prompts.label: App foreground and background refreshes
prompts.text:
Explain reacting when the app resumes from background to refresh stale data.
Discuss debouncing refreshes when users tab quickly.
Mention battery/network friendliness briefly.
Relate biometric lock overlays as an edge-case pointer.
Show a conceptual state machine "active/inactive/background".

prompts.label: Safe areas and notches
prompts.text:
Teach respecting safe-area insets for notches and rounded corners.
Compare Flutter SafeArea/MediaQuery.padding with RN SafeAreaView patterns.
Warn against magic numbers tuned to one phone model.
Mention keyboards covering inputs as a sibling problem.
Encourage testing on small and large phones.

prompts.label: OTA updates caution
prompts.text:
Explain OTA-style JS updates versus full store releases.
Emphasize store policy realities at a headline level.
Discuss rollback strategies and staged rollouts verbally.
Warn about native module mismatches breaking OTA bundles.
Advise versioning discipline between native and JS layers.

prompts.label: Profiling jank casually
prompts.text:
Encourage distinguishing animation jank versus slow network spinner waits.
Mention Xcode Instruments / Android Studio Profiler as starting points alongside Flutter DevTools/React DevTools analogs.
Advise profiling release builds periodically.
Warn about micro-optimization during prototyping.
Recommend one concrete profiling scenario to practice.

prompts.label: Store listings localization lite
prompts.text:
Explain tailoring screenshots and store text for locales you truly support.
Mention following platform-required dimensions.
Advise honest descriptions and changelog habits.
Relate phased rollout percentages as a risk reducer.
Keep this light: not full ASO marketing.
